Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Library of Short Stories 43 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. A Recursive Algorithm to Render Signed Distance Fields 53 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. SBCL Fibers – Lightweight Cooperative Threads 29 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Baochip-1x: What it is, why I'm doing it now and how it came about 274 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. Show HN: GrobPaint: Somewhere Between MS Paint and Paint.net 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Marketing for Founders 119 upvotes, 34 comments
  7. Bumblebee queens breathe underwater to survive drowning 61 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. How Kernel Anti-Cheats Work: A Deep Dive into Modern Game Protection 25 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. Python: The Optimization Ladder 275 upvotes, 98 comments
  10. Allow me to get to know you, mistakes and all 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Fedora 44 on the Raspberry Pi 5 68 upvotes, 21 comments
  12. Postgres with Builtin File Systems 38 upvotes, 10 comments
  13. Learning Creative Coding 44 upvotes, 13 comments
  14. Launching the Claude Partner Network 85 upvotes, 31 comments
  15. Show HN: Ichinichi – One note per day, E2E encrypted, local-first 75 upvotes, 27 comments
  16. Tree Search Distillation for Language Models Using PPO 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  17. Deriving Type Erasure 26 upvotes, 7 comments
  18. Airbus is preparing two uncrewed combat aircraft 62 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. Making your JITted Code known: Let me count the ways 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  20. From Braun T3 to Apple's iPod 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  21. Hazardous substances found in all headphones tested by ToxFREE project 82 upvotes, 42 comments
  22. Offloading FFmpeg with Cloudflare 41 upvotes, 18 comments
  23. Ageless Linux – Software for humans of indeterminate age 324 upvotes, 209 comments
  24. Mathematics Distillation Challenge – Equational Theories 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Changes to OpenTTD Distribution on Steam 128 upvotes, 76 comments
  26. An ode to bzip 98 upvotes, 56 comments
  27. Federal Surveillance Tech Becomes Mandatory in New Cars by 2027 58 upvotes, 31 comments
  28. Show HN: Han – A Korean programming language written in Rust 111 upvotes, 68 comments
  29. Montana passes Right to Compute act (2025) 245 upvotes, 207 comments
  30. 9 Mothers Defense (YC P26) Is Hiring in Austin 0 upvotes, 0 comments
